message:
fix(gateway): add NaN validation and semver comparison fixes

- accounts.ts: Add NaN validation for parseInt on limit parameter
  - Prevents passing NaN to listProfiles when limit is not a valid number
  - Also validates that limit is positive

- utilities.service.ts: Add proper semver comparison function
  - Replace incorrect string comparison with numeric semver comparison
  - "3.0.9" < "3.0.10" now correctly returns true (was false before)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
